scripts.db:generate: bash -lc 'set -a && source ./.env && set +a && pnpm --dir apps/api exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:validate: bash -lc 'set -a && source ./.env && set +a && pnpm --dir apps/api exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.platform.yml up -d postgres && docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.platform.yml run --rm --build api sh -lc 'cd /app/apps/api && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy'
